summary: Comprehensive testing of the new booking flow for VenuLoQ. All features working correctly: (1) Landing page search card correctly shows guests/date inputs after city selection, (2) localStorage stores booking_guests and booking_date on search, (3) Backend APIs /api/rms/available, /api/rms/top-performers, and POST /api/leads all working with selected_rm_id and guest_count_range fields, (4) Venue page 'Start Planning' button correctly gates authentication - redirects to /auth with redirect param when not logged in, (5) Booking modal shows 3-phase flow: Assigning RM animation (2.5s) -> RM Selection (3 RMs with photos, ratings, top performer badges) -> Phone Verification with user info summary -> Success screen with booking ref and RM name.

tests.test: Landing page loads with search card
Date input is HTML5 date picker
booking_guests saved to localStorage on search
booking_date saved to localStorage on search
RMs have required fields (user_id, name, rating, completed_events, bio)
Returns 3 RMs: Rahul Sharma, Priya Singh, Amit Kumar
POST /api/leads with selected_rm_id assigns that RM
Start Planning button exists on venue page (mobile)
Speak to Our Venue Expert button exists (desktop sidebar)
Toast shows 'Please sign in to start planning your event'
Modal opens on authenticated Start Planning click
Phase 2: RM Selection view shows 3 RMs
RM cards show name, rating, events, top performer badge
Phase 3: Phone verify shows user info summary
Success screen shows selected RM name

seed_data_creation: Test leads created with TEST_ prefix during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: New booking flow fully implemented and tested. EnquiryForm.js has 3 phases: assigning (2.5s auto-advance), rm-selection (shows RMs from /api/rms/available with top-performers badges), phone-verify (shows user summary + phone input). POST /api/leads accepts selected_rm_id and guest_count_range. Landing page search card stores booking_guests and booking_date to localStorage. Auth gate on venue page 'Start Planning' button works correctly. Desktop uses 'Speak to Our Venue Expert' button in sidebar CTA.
